question_html: Which of the following spellings is incorrect?
solution_html: Correct spelling- Indigenous

question_html: Find out the correct spelling.
solution_html: Correct spelling: Commission, Vigilance, Accessible.

question_html: Which of the following spellings is incorrect?
solution_html: Correct spelling- Incomparable.

question_html: Find out the correct spelling.
solution_html: Correct spelling: Inequality, Resistance, Suffrage.

question_html: You can die ____ cold in the streets.
An old man with steel rimmed spectacles and very dusty clothes sat ____ the side of the road.
solution_html: কোনো কিছুর পাশে বোঝাতে Preposition by বসে।

question_html: When a girl gets married, she usually drops out ____ school.
The scribes loaded their wages ____ bullocks.
Charles was determined to insist ____ his rights.
solution_html: Appropriate preposition হিসেবে insist on বসে।

question_html: In Bangladesh, cyber bullying is not just an act to be scorned at but is an offence punishable under the ICT Act. The underlined word is a/an ______.
solution_html: এখানে ‘bullying’ sub. হিসেবে ব্যবহৃত হয়ে noun এর কাজ করেছে। তাই এটি Gerund.

question_html: And if even little waves develop, it saps the ebbing energy of the swimmer. The underlined word is a/an _____.
The system of education in our part of the world doesn’t allow children much freedom. The underlined part is a/an _____.
solution_html: এখানে ‘in our part of the world’ phrase-টি ‘education’ noun টিকে modify করায় এটি adjective phrase.

question_html: I was told that I couldn’t afford to waste 10 minutes. The underlined part is a/an ____.
solution_html: এখানে ‘told’ transitive verb হওয়ায় এর object হিসেবে that I couldn’t afford to waste 10 minutes টি বসায় এটি noun clause.

question_html: Which of the following is a noun?
Which of the following is a noun?
Change into indirect speech: “I don’t know where he is.” she said.
options_html: She said that she doesn’t know where he is.
She said that she didn’t know where he was.
She said that she don’t know where he is.
She said that she didn’t knew where he was.
correct_answer_html: She said that she didn’t know where he was.
solution_html: Direct speech এর Reported speech-এ present indefinite tense থাকলে Indirect speech-এ past indefinite tense হবে।

question_html: “Nor sit in learning’s bower” is an example of-
William Blake is a/an ____ poet .
solution_html: William Blake ছিলেন একজন ইংরেজ কবি ও চিত্রশিল্পী।

question_html: Where is ‘Innisfree’ located?
Choose the sentence with correct punctuation.
options_html: Another football magician Golam Rabbani Choton the coach of Bangladesh Women’s National Football Team mentored these girls.
Another football magician, Golam Rabbani Choton, the coach of Bangladesh Womens’ National Football Team, mentored these girls.
Another football magician, Golam Rabbani Choton, the coach of Bangladesh Women’s National Football Team, mentored these girls.
Another football magician Golam Rabbani Choton, the coach of Bangladesh Women’s National Football Team, mentored these girls.
correct_answer_html: Another football magician, Golam Rabbani Choton, the coach of Bangladesh Women’s National Football Team, mentored these girls.

question_html: Choose the sentence with correct punctuation.
options_html: Khorshed set me a camp, a wooden bed chair, and table in a thatched bamboo outhouse.
Khorshed set me a camp; a wooden bed, chair and table in a thatched bamboo outhouse.
Khorshed set me a camp: a wooden bed, chair, and table in a thatched bamboo outhouse.
Khorshed set me a camp – a wooden bed, chair and table in a thatched, bamboo outhouse.
correct_answer_html: Khorshed set me a camp; a wooden bed, chair and table in a thatched bamboo outhouse.

question_html: I fell ___ my job quite by accident.
What does the idiom “to get someone’s teeth into something” mean?
options_html: To avoid doing a difficult task
To become enthusiastic about a task
correct_answer_html: To become enthusiastic about a task
solution_html: To get someone’s teeth into something- কোনো কিছুর প্রতি খুব উদ্যমী।

question_html: Transform the sentence into complex : The calorie-rich junk food does look mouth-watering but is known to be nutritionally poor.
options_html: In spite of the calorie-rich junk food being mouth-watering, it is known to be nutritionally poor.
Though the calorie-rich junk food does look mouth-watering, it is known to be nutritionally poor.
The calorie-rich junk food does look mouth-watering yet it is known to be nutritionally poor.
As the calorie-rich junk food does look mouth-watering, it is known to be nutritionally poor.
correct_answer_html: Though the calorie-rich junk food does look mouth-watering, it is known to be nutritionally poor.
solution_html: Compound sentence এ but থাকলে Complex sentence-এ Clause Marker হিসেবে Though/Although বসে।

question_html: Transform the sentence into compound: While many theories have been proposed about the reason and function of dreams, no consensus has emerged.
options_html: Many theories have been proposed about the reason and function of dreams, yet no consensus has emerged.
Although many theories have been proposed, no consensus has emerged.
Many theories having been proposed, no consensus has emerged.
Despite many theories being proposed, no consensus has emerged.
correct_answer_html: Many theories have been proposed about the reason and function of dreams, yet no consensus has emerged.
solution_html: যে sentence-এ দুই বা ততোধিক principal clause কোনো Co-ordinate conjunction দ্বারা যুক্ত থাকে তাকে compound sentence বলে।

question_html: The bird’s nest made of straw and twigs could not hold _ knowledge.
If the starfish are still on the beach when the sun rises, they ____ .
solution_html: 1st conditional-এ if যুক্ত অংশটি present indefinite হলে অপর অংশটি future indefinite হবে।

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: Try to avoid smack and chew loudly, and keep your mouth shut while chew.
Try to avoid smack and chewing loudly, and keep your mouth shut when chewing.
Try to avoid smacking and chew loudly, and keep your mouth shut while chewing.
Try to avoid smacking and chewing loudly, and keep your mouth shut while chewing.
correct_answer_html: Try to avoid smacking and chewing loudly, and keep your mouth shut while chewing.

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: Neither was he a polite man, nor he like other people to be polite to each other.
Neither he was a polite man, nor did he like other people to be polite to each other.
Neither was he a polite man, nor did he like other people to be polite to each other.
Neither he was a polite man, nor he like other people to be polite to each other.
correct_answer_html: Neither was he a polite man, nor did he like other people to be polite to each other.
solution_html: ‘Neither’ বাক্যের শুরুতে থাকলে Inversion এর Structure অনুসরণ করতে হয়। Neither + Auxiliary Verb + Subject + Main Verb + Extension.

question_html: Find the incorrect part: If you are protesting against any unjust decision of the local municipality, you are civically engaged and your action is considered as a civic engagement.
solution_html: Correct Sentence: If you are protesting against any unjust decision of the local municipality, you are civically engaged and your action is considered a civic engagement.

question_html: Identify the sentence type : I have been facing a few problems since the very beginning.
solution_html: যে sentence-এ একটি মাত্র subject ও একটি finite verb থাকে, তাকে simple sentence বলে।

question_html: Identify the sentence type: We are expected to apply the knowledge, skills and values that we learn in a classroom.
solution_html: যে sentence এ একটি principal clause এবং এক বা একাধিক sub ordinate clause থাকে, তাকে complex sentence বলে।

question_html: These are all examples of Civic engagement _____ what you do directly affects the community.
The idea of _____ perfect society is appealing, but ____ reality often falls short.
Choose the correct passive form: The city paid back the bounty of the river by sucking life out of it.
options_html: The bounty of the river had been paid back by sucking life out of it by the city.
The bounty of the river was paid back by sucking life out of it by the city.
The bounty of the river is being paid back by the city by sucking life out of it.
The bounty of the river will be paid back by the city by sucking life out of it.
correct_answer_html: The bounty of the river was paid back by sucking life out of it by the city.

question_html: Choose the correct passive form: Villagers in the nearby areas were helping these people in all possible ways.
options_html: These people are being helped by villagers in the nearby areas in all possible ways.
These people have been helped by villagers in the nearby areas in all possible ways.
These people were helped by villagers in the nearby areas in all possible ways.
These people were being helped by villagers in the nearby areas in all possible ways.
correct_answer_html: These people were being helped by villagers in the nearby areas in all possible ways.

question_html: I could see the record, like the proverbial carrot, dangling before my eyes. Here, the word ‘like’ is used as
solution_html: Preposition সাধারণত noun/pronoun/noun phrase এর পূর্বে বসে। এখানে the proverbial carrot হলো noun phrase এবং এর পূর্বে like বসায় তা preposition হবে।

question_html: Which word is closest in meaning to “abridged”?
Which is the opposite of “eloquent”?
solution_html:
Eloquent- প্রাঞ্চল, সাবলীল;

Inanticulate- ভাব প্রকাশে অক্ষম।

question_html: Which word is closest in meaning to “apathy”?
Choose the antonym of “preach”.
solution_html:
Preach- ধর্মপ্রচার করা;

Ignore- অবহেলা করা;

Proclaim- প্রচার করা;

Rivalry- দ্বন্দ্ব;

Message- বার্তা।

question_html: Choose the synonym of “supine”.
solution_html:
Supine- চিত হয়ে শোয়া;

Upright- খাড়া;

Reclining- শায়িত অবস্থা;

Pure- বিশুদ্ধ।

question_html: It is ____to take a small gift for the host if invited to a home in Britain.
Choose the synonym of “medieval”.
solution_html:
Medieval- মধ্যযুগীয়;

Futuristic- আধুনিক;

Ancient- প্রাচীন;

Modern- আধুনিক।

question_html: Choose the synonym of “delicate”.
solution_html:
Delicate-দুর্বল;

Fragile- ভঙ্গুর;

Servitude-বশ্যতা;

Rough- কঠোর।

question_html: Choose the synonym of “naive”.
Choose the synonym of “faint”
solution_html: Faint- ক্ষীণ; অস্পষ্ট; Dim- অস্পষ্ট; Bright- উজ্জ্বল; Clear- স্পষ্ট।

question_html: Choose the correct sentence with appropriate use of modifier.
options_html: Unable to convince their close relatives of the risks, Shilpi and Rashid returned to the counsellor.
Being persuaded by salespersons’ words, they convince us to buy unnecessary items.
Getting married, her in laws force her to do household work.
Having being injured from a piece of glass, the owner of the glass factory refused to pay Amerigo’s friend.
correct_answer_html: Unable to convince their close relatives of the risks, Shilpi and Rashid returned to the counsellor.

question_html: Which of the following is not true about Nishat Mazumder?
options_html: She has enrolled for her MA in Japan Studies at Dhaka University.
She was an ambassador of “Bangladesh Mountaineering and Trekking Club (BMTC)”.
She is apparently an ordinary girl.
correct_answer_html: She was an ambassador of “Bangladesh Mountaineering and Trekking Club (BMTC)”.
solution_html: নিশাত মজুমদার “Because I am a Girl” campaign- এর Ambassador ছিলেন।

question_html: What shouldn’t you do if you are in China?
Who became the first person from Asia to swim across the English Channel?
The machine ________, scattering all the letters it ________ into the sky.
I have a dream that one day every valley ________.
The situation you are facing ________ as cyber bullying.
Jerry’s only ________ is to say he has a mother.
solution_html: Subterfuge শব্দের অর্থ ছলচাতুরী। জেরির মা নেই, তবুও সে লেখককে তার মা আছে বলে ছলচাতুরী করেছে।

question_html: How shall the ________ arise in joy, / Or the ________ fruits appear?
When you’re sitting down, your ________ should be upright and attentive.
In a traditional society like ours, little boys and girls are given ________ sets of toys.
solution_html: Distinct শব্দের অর্থ পৃথক, স্বতন্ত্র।

question_html: Amerigo used to serve a ________.
solution_html: আমেরিগো Vendor এবং Ice cream shop owner এর জন্য কাজ করতো। প্রশ্নে Gap-এর আগে যেহেতু article ‘a’ আছে, তাই এখানে ‘ice cream shop owner’ অপশনটি ব্যবহার করা যাবে না।

question_html: A warrior of light tries to establish what he can truly ________ on .
solution_html: কোনো কিছুর উপর নির্ভর করা অর্থে appropriate preposition ‘rely on’ বসে।
